channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Asking what love would do transforms leadership [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Pediatrician and certified coach Jessie Mahoney discusses her article...

item.title: Patients want bigger benefits from statins before they consider taking them, finds new study
item.description: Heart disease remains one of the leading causes of death worldwide. To lower this risk, doctors prescribe statin drugs that reduce low-density lipopro...

item.title: What causes depression? What we know, don't know and suspect
item.description: Depression is a complex and deeply personal experience. While almost everyone has periods of sadness, low mood or grief, depression is different. Majo...

item.title: Can psychopaths change?
item.description: Psychopaths might account for only about 1% of the general population, but they account for a disproportionate share of violent crime.

item.title: Blood test boosts Alzheimer's diagnosis accuracy to 94.5%, clinical study shows
item.description: A protein lurking around in the blood can help with the accurate diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease. In a recent study, researchers from Spain investiga...

item.title: New 'navigator' model aims to speed cell and gene therapies to patients
item.description: Despite innovative new research, many cell and gene therapies do not make it all the way to the patients. Researchers and clinicians in Lund have now ...

item.title: Poly-L-lysine-coated catheters are safe and well-tolerated in adults requiring short-term catheterization
item.description: 1. Poly-L-lysine (PLL)-coated catheters are well-tolerated, safe, and noninferior in preventing bacteriuria compared to noble metal alloys (NMA)-coate...

item.title: Integrative oncology nutrition: a case study in leukemia recovery
item.description: She arrived exhausted, a shadow of the lively 31-year-old she once was. She was diagnosed with leukemia in January 2023, underwent intensive IV chemot...

item.title: Agentic AI: the key to saving annual preventive exams

item.title: Penpulimab and lenalidomide in combination with standard of care chemoimmunotherapy demonstrates promising safety and efficacy in diffuse large B-cell lymphoma

item.title: Artificial intelligence predicts colorectal cancer in ulcerative colitis with 99% accuracy

item.title: Birthing Techniques Linked to ADHD Risk
item.description: Using a vacuum followed by forceps was associated with a higher risk for ADHD than delivery by second-stage cesarean. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Certain Occupations Linked to Higher IBD Risk

item.title: Healthy Life Expectancy Declines Again

item.title: Protective Clothing, Low-Cost Sunscreens May Cut Expenses
